org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory

Interface FigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graphs supported by this factory.
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractFigureFactory, AbstractStandardFigureFactory, FSMFigureFactory

    public interface FigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
    This interface is a factory of figures that permits to create a figure and bind it to a model element.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
      Add a collision avoider that may be used by this factory.
      Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID, G graph, ModelObject object, float x, float y)
      Create a node figure for the given object at the specified position.
      Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID, G graph, ModelObject object, float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2)
      Create an edge figure for the given object between the specified points.
      Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID, Rectangle2f documentRect, G graph, ModelObject object)
      Create a figure for the given object and try to put it in the best position.
      SubFigure createSubFigureInside(UUID viewID, G graph, Figure parent, ModelObject object)
      Create a sub figure for the given model object inside the given figure.
      void removeCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
      Remove a collision avoider to be no more used by this factory.
      void removeSubFigureFrom(UUID viewID, G graph, Figure parent, SubFigure subfigure)
      Remove a sub figure for the given figure.

    • Method Detail

      • addCollisionAvoider

        void addCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
        Add a collision avoider that may be used by this factory.
        Parameters:
        collisionAvoider -

      • removeCollisionAvoider

        void removeCollisionAvoider(CollisionAvoider collisionAvoider)
        Remove a collision avoider to be no more used by this factory.
        Parameters:
        collisionAvoider -

      • createFigureFor

        Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID,
                     Rectangle2f documentRect,
                     G graph,
                     ModelObject object)
                       throws FigureFactoryException
        Create a figure for the given object and try to put it in the best position.
        Parameters:
        viewID - is the identifier of the view.
        documentRect - is the area covered by the document.
        graph - is the graph inside which the model was added.
        object - is the model object for which a view should be created.
        Returns:
        the created view.
        Throws:
        FigureFactoryException

      • createFigureFor

        Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID,
                     G graph,
                     ModelObject object,
                     float x,
                     float y)
                       throws FigureFactoryException
        Create a node figure for the given object at the specified position.
        Parameters:
        viewID - is the identifier of the view.
        graph - is the graph inside which the model was added.
        object - is the model object for which a view should be created.
        x - is the position of the new set of figures.
        y - is the position of the new set of figures.
        Returns:
        the created view.
        Throws:
        FigureFactoryException

      • createFigureFor

        Figure createFigureFor(UUID viewID,
                     G graph,
                     ModelObject object,
                     float x1,
                     float y1,
                     float x2,
                     float y2)
                       throws FigureFactoryException
        Create an edge figure for the given object between the specified points.
        Parameters:
        viewID - is the identifier of the view.
        graph - is the graph inside which the model was added.
        object - is the model object for which a view should be created.
        x1 - is the position of the first point of the figure.
        y1 - is the position of the first point of the figure.
        x2 - is the position of the second point of the figure.
        y2 - is the position of the second point of the figure.
        Returns:
        the created view.
        Throws:
        FigureFactoryException

      • createSubFigureInside

        SubFigure createSubFigureInside(UUID viewID,
                              G graph,
                              Figure parent,
                              ModelObject object)
        Create a sub figure for the given model object inside the given figure.
        Parameters:
        viewID - is the identifier of the view.
        graph - is the graph inside which the model was added.
        parent - is the figure inside which the subfigure may be inserted.
        object - is the model object for which a view should be created.
        Returns:
        the created view.

      • removeSubFigureFrom

        void removeSubFigureFrom(UUID viewID,
                       G graph,
                       Figure parent,
                       SubFigure subfigure)
        Remove a sub figure for the given figure.
        Parameters:
        viewID - is the identifier of the view.
        graph - is the graph inside which the model was added.
        parent - is the figure from which the subfigure may be removed.
        subfigure - is the subfigure to remove.
